info.title: cs-syntaxer
info.description: C# syntax provider for CS-Script scripts. This service is created to allow the integration of C# syntax services with various extendible IDE (e.g. VSCode, Notepad++, Sublime Text)

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
Syntax provider for C# scripts (cs-script).
Path: <path>

options.name: -detect
options.description: Prints location of the detected CS-Script installation as well as its own assembly path.

options.name: -kill
options.description:
Terminates all currently running syntaxer services.
It's an equivalent of `syntaxer -list kill *` command.

options.name: -list
options.description:
Prints list of all currently running syntaxer services.
kill|k - Allow user to select and terminate any running syntaxer service.
* - Allow user to terminate all running syntaxer service when 'kill' option is used.
*   (e.g. syntaxer -list kill * ).
